title: Kuwait cuts oil production as Strait of Hormuz closure disrupts global energy market
summary_full: Brent oil prices could spike above $100 per barrel if the Gulf Arab countries run out of storage  space and shut down production, according to JPMorgan.
summary_public: Brent oil prices could spike above $100 per barrel if the Gulf Arab countries run out of storage  space and shut down production, according to JPMorgan.
